unmatchedSentences.text: It's wonderful. No traffic. It's just wonderful.
That's not to say they're making a complete U-turn. Far from it. Whatever happens, public transit is going to be the main way that people are expected to travel and it can be done.

longSentences.text: Another example of recent progress is the southern section of the Blue Line, now called the A- Line, heading straight out of Compton down to Long Beach, the route was given upgraded tracks, power lines, switching, and control systems back in 2019.
